questions.prompt: Tom is my brother. ____ is ten years old.
questions.explanation: Tom 是男生，而且空格在句子的主詞位置，所以要用主格 He。

questions.prompt: Lisa is my sister. ____ likes apples.
questions.explanation: Lisa 是女生，而且空格當主詞，所以要用主格 She。

questions.prompt: My dog is small. ____ runs fast.
questions.explanation: My dog 是一隻動物，作主詞時可用 It。

questions.prompt: Jack and I are classmates. ____ study English.
questions.explanation: Jack and I 包含我自己，作主詞時要用 We。

questions.prompt: Amy and Ben are friends. ____ play soccer.
questions.explanation: Amy and Ben 是兩個人，作主詞時要用 They。

questions.prompt: My mother is a teacher. ____ works at school.
questions.explanation: My mother 是女生，空格是主詞，所以用 She。

questions.prompt: My father is tall. ____ can swim.
questions.explanation: My father 是男生，作主詞時要用 He。

questions.prompt: The students are in the classroom. ____ are quiet.
questions.explanation: The students 是複數主詞，所以要用 They。

questions.prompt: The book is on the desk. ____ is new.
questions.explanation: The book 是單數物品，作主詞時用 It。

questions.prompt: You and your brother are late. ____ need to hurry.
questions.explanation: You 可以表示你們，作主詞時仍然用 You。

questions.prompt: Mary and I like music. ____ sing every day.
questions.explanation: Mary and I 包含說話者，所以主格用 We。

questions.prompt: Peter has a bike. ____ rides it to school.
questions.explanation: Peter 是男生，句子主詞要用 He。

questions.prompt: The cat is under the chair. ____ is sleeping.
questions.explanation: The cat 是單數動物，作主詞時可用 It。

questions.prompt: Anna is happy. ____ has a new pencil.
questions.explanation: Anna 是女生，作主詞時要用 She。

questions.prompt: My friends are here. ____ want to play.
questions.explanation: My friends 是複數，主格要用 They。

questions.prompt: I am hungry. ____ want some bread.
questions.explanation: 空格在主詞位置，說自己時要用主格 I。

questions.prompt: Kevin and Sam are brothers. ____ share a room.
questions.explanation: Kevin and Sam 是兩個人，作主詞時用 They。

questions.prompt: This pencil is red. ____ is short.
questions.explanation: This pencil 是單數物品，主詞代名詞用 It。

questions.prompt: Jenny is my cousin. ____ lives in Taipei.
questions.explanation: Jenny 是女生，而且空格作主詞，所以用 She。

questions.prompt: My uncle is a doctor. ____ helps sick people.
questions.explanation: My uncle 是男生，作主詞時要用 He。

questions.prompt: The girls are in the park. ____ are playing.
questions.explanation: The girls 是複數，主格要用 They。

questions.prompt: The boys are noisy. ____ talk a lot.
questions.explanation: The boys 是複數主詞，所以用 They。

questions.prompt: My grandma is kind. ____ makes cookies.
questions.explanation: My grandma 是女生，句子主詞用 She。

questions.prompt: My grandpa is old. ____ walks slowly.
questions.explanation: My grandpa 是男生，作主詞時用 He。

questions.prompt: The bird is in the tree. ____ can fly.
questions.explanation: The bird 是單數動物，作主詞時可用 It。

questions.prompt: You are my best friend. ____ are nice.
questions.explanation: You 作主詞時仍然寫 You。

questions.prompt: My sister and I like art. ____ draw pictures.
questions.explanation: My sister and I 包含我自己，所以主格用 We。

questions.prompt: The teacher is in the office. ____ is busy.
questions.explanation: The teacher 在這裡指一位女老師，作主詞時用 She。

questions.prompt: Mr. Lin is my teacher. ____ teaches math.
questions.explanation: Mr. Lin 是男生稱謂，主格用 He。

questions.prompt: The windows are open. ____ are big.
questions.explanation: The windows 是複數物品，作主詞時用 They。

questions.prompt: The baby is crying. ____ is hungry.
questions.explanation: 不知道 baby 性別時，可以用 It 作主詞。

questions.prompt: David is from Canada. ____ speaks English.
questions.explanation: David 是男生名字，空格作主詞，所以用 He。

questions.prompt: Helen has two cats. ____ loves animals.
questions.explanation: Helen 是女生名字，作主詞時用 She。

questions.prompt: The chairs are blue. ____ are old.
questions.explanation: The chairs 是複數物品，主格用 They。

questions.prompt: My brother and my sister are students. ____ go to school by bus.
questions.explanation: My brother and my sister 是兩個人，作主詞時用 They。

questions.prompt: Mom and Dad are at home. ____ are cooking.
questions.explanation: Mom and Dad 是兩個人，作主詞時要用 They。

questions.prompt: The computer is on the table. ____ is black.
questions.explanation: The computer 是單數物品，所以主格用 It。

questions.prompt: Grace and Tina are sisters. ____ look alike.
questions.explanation: Grace and Tina 是兩個女生，複數主詞用 They。

questions.prompt: My family and I eat dinner together. ____ are happy.
questions.explanation: My family and I 包含我自己，所以主格用 We。

questions.prompt: The cake is sweet. ____ tastes good.
questions.explanation: The cake 是單數物品，作主詞時用 It。

questions.prompt: My classmates and I are ready. ____ can start now.
questions.explanation: My classmates and I 包含說話者，主格要用 We。

questions.prompt: The fish are in the pond. ____ swim fast.
questions.explanation: The fish 這裡是複數，作主詞時用 They。

questions.prompt: Nina is in the library. ____ is reading.
questions.explanation: Nina 是女生名字，主詞代名詞用 She。

questions.prompt: Leo is in the kitchen. ____ is washing dishes.
questions.explanation: Leo 是男生名字，作主詞時用 He。

questions.prompt: The flowers are beautiful. ____ smell good.
questions.explanation: The flowers 是複數物品，主格用 They。

questions.prompt: My aunt is young. ____ has long hair.
questions.explanation: My aunt 是女生，作主詞時要用 She。

questions.prompt: My cousin Ken is funny. ____ tells jokes.
questions.explanation: Ken 是男生名字，作主詞時用 He。

questions.prompt: The door is closed. ____ is brown.
questions.explanation: The door 是單數物品，主格用 It。

questions.prompt: Rita and I are on the team. ____ practice after school.
questions.explanation: Rita and I 包含我自己，所以用主格 We。

questions.prompt: The children are excited. ____ like the game.
questions.explanation: The children 是複數，作主詞時用 They。
